title: Chapter 103
content:
Chapter 103: Into Space...

That night, I quietly slipped out of the kitchen/dining hut without the two macho guys noticing.

I hung my long robe on the chicken coop in the courtyard and stripped completely naked.

Then, moving silently so the dog girls wouldn’t notice, I sneaked out of the church fully nude.

Unlike modern times, there was no electricity, and people here went to sleep once the sun went down, so no one was around.

There was no worry of being seen while wandering around naked, and if I sensed anyone, I could just sprint away at full speed.

After all, I had the physical ability of one of the strongest people in the country, so getting caught was impossible.

The city at night was even quieter than a school at night.

It was hard to believe thousands of people lived here.

Everyone must have been asleep.

Fortunately, as a modern Japanese night owl who used to stay up late masturbating, I still wasn’t sleepy at all.

The city gate was closed, so I jumped over the city wall and came out into the wasteland.

I walked two or three kilometers in the direction of the moon. Even if it got too dark to see the wall, heading away from the moon would let me return.

There was virtually no risk of being seen, so this area should be fine.

In the empty wilderness, I closed my eyes.

Remember...

All the erotic events I’ve experienced since coming to this other world...

Twitch...

Good, I’m hard.

"Wind Pressure Masturbation!"

The wind generated around my right testicle wrapped around to the left one, tracing a figure-eight pattern.

The two balls are infinite. The power of rotation increases infinitely...

Rustle rustle, whoosh!

My pubic hair stood up wildly like a lion’s mane.

The wind accelerated, eventually climbing up my shaft like a dragon aiming for the heavens.

WHOOOOSH!

My cock was enveloped in invisible wind.

"Alright. Time to train this skill."

Lucia had been releasing her masturbation urges these past few days by flirting with the beastkin.

But eventually she’ll want to masturbate again.

So I’ll raise the power of Wind Pressure Masturbation so she can feel even better when that time comes!

Previously, Wind Pressure Masturbation could only slightly open Dragon Lucia’s anus. Without an orc’s club-like dick, I wouldn’t have been able to penetrate it. That’s not good enough.

I must open Dragon Lucia’s anus with Wind Pressure Masturbation alone.

This is a secret special training!

"UOOOOOH!"

I got down on all fours on the ground. The output of the wind immediately tried to lift my hips.

If I stayed like this, just like before, only my hips would float up and I’d end up doing a forward roll.

But there was one thing I wanted to try.

The moment my hips lifted, I curled my body, hugged both knees with my arms, and bent my neck backward.

Basically a gymnastics sitting position with my head thrown back. My body spun whoosh

—my face was about to slam into the ground—!

Right before impact, my body gently floated upward.

I was upside down, but without rotating, I was floating in the air.

"Success! When my body was extended, the center of gravity and the direction of the tornado caused me to spin, but by curling up small like this, it stabilizes! Just as I thought!"

GOOOOOOOOOOOH!

Even in an upside-down gymnastics sitting position, I was definitely floating. No—I was flying!

I’ll slowly increase the output and ascend.

Good. I can control it.

But—

"Uwah, UWAAAAAH!"

Horizontal spin!

I had completely forgotten.

Because the propulsion came from a tornado, I ended up spinning sideways.

Moreover, because my center of gravity was concentrated in the middle of the axis, the rotation was fast.

It’s the same principle as when you spin on an office chair: pulling your legs in makes you spin faster.

In my panic, I accidentally increased the output of Wind Pressure Masturbation and shot high into the sky.

"GUWAAAAAAAAAH!"

I lost all sense of my position and orientation.

It was pitch black all around, and I couldn’t even tell which way was up or down. Just how high had I gone?

I was definitely starting to fall, but I couldn’t see the ground!

That’s right.

I heard that fighter pilots in the era before attitude indicators would look for the horizon when they lost track of up and down...

No good!

It’s too dark to see the horizon!

I underestimated night flying!

In that case, five-point landing it is.

It’s the method airborne troops use to absorb impact when dropping from high altitude.

Land on both feet, bend the knees to cushion the shock, then roll your butt down, curl up, and push against the ground with both hands to kill the momentum.

With this method, you can safely land from about 15 meters without injury.

No! I can’t do it because I can’t see the ground in the first place!

"UWAAAAAAAH!"

Grab!

"Are you okay?"

"L-Lucia?"

Thud.

I was caught in mid-air in a princess carry by Lucia. She slowly descended and gently placed me on the ground.

"Thank you."

"You’re welcome."

I was momentarily entranced.

Lucia was in her original Dragon God form for the first time in a while.

Her silver hair glowed blue in the moonlight.

For some reason she was completely naked, exposing her flawless, perfectly sculpted beauty to the night wind.

Her skin was so smooth and translucent that not even a single fine hair could be seen. Truly mystical beauty...

"How did you know I was here?"

"I can always tell where you are. If you concentrate, Masaharu, you should be able to sense where I am too, right?"

"Really?"

"Yeah. ...By the way, what were you doing?"

"Uhh..."

It’s hard to say I was training my dick so I could break through your hymen.

"I thought if I could fly, maybe I could find a safe place for the beastkin to live."

This wasn’t a complete lie — it was something I had genuinely hoped to do — so it came out naturally.

"I see."

"A place where the capybara girl can always soak in hot springs, and the pussy girls and dog girls can run around freely."

"I’ll help too!"

"Really?"

"Yeah. I also want to take hot springs baths with the kemololi girls."

"But the water has to be below 40°C for them, okay? No magma baths, got it?"

"I know..."

She clearly didn’t look like she knew...

"Flying is essential for searching for good land. So help me train and strengthen Wind Pressure Masturbation so I can fly!"

"Yeah! The fact that you insist on flying with Wind Pressure Masturbation instead of flight magic is one of the best things about you, Masaharu!"

"Huh? There’s flight magic?"

"There is, but Masaharu flying with Wind Pressure Masturbation is so cool!"

"...I see."

Wait.

If there’s flight magic, I’d rather learn that one? Huh?

Well, of course training Wind Pressure Masturbation is important, but I’d still like to learn flight magic separately.

Hm?

Lucia crouched down and casually grabbed my erect cock.

Squeeze.

She tilted my dick slightly to the left.

"Release it."

"Huh? If I release it from this position, it’ll hit your face. Is that okay?"

"Yeah. It’s fine."

"Got it. Stroke it up and down for me."

"Huh?"

"Huh? I need stimulation to release it."

"...Not semen. Release Wind Pressure Masturbation."

"...Right."

Ugh.

I made an embarrassing misunderstanding.

Of course. We were talking about Wind Pressure Masturbation, so when she said "release it," she obviously meant that.

Even at full power, I probably wouldn’t hurt Lucia’s hand, so I’ll let it out without holding back.

"Wind Pressure Masturbation!"

WHOOOSH!

The infinite whirlwind born from my balls enveloped my shaft and Lucia’s hand.

"Look. Left rotation."

"Huh?"

"Your cock curves to the right, so the tornado spins right. But right now I’m bending it to the left, so the tornado is spinning left."

"Eh? Really?"

"Yeah. I’ll let go, so maintain the left rotation."

"O-okay."

"Do your best. Cock, do your best!"

"Thank you!"

GOOOOOOOOOOOOOOH!

It really was left rotation. As I increased the output, the left-spinning wind tickled my chest.

"Stop! Switch to right rotation!"

"...! Got it!"

WHOOSH!

I did it! The pressure on my cock reversed direction.

"Stop! Back to left rotation!"

"Aaah!"

Focus on left rotation!

Consciously make it spin left! Create wind in the opposite direction of my cock’s curve!

"UOOOOOOOOOH! Wind Pressure Masturbation Reversal: Impossible Air Reverse!"

Ding

(The occasional brain system message sound).

You have acquired the skill 『Wind Pressure Masturbation Reversal』.

Skill 1: Dragon God’s Blessing

Skill 2: Sex Warrior Lv8

Skill 3: Wind Pressure Masturbation

Skill 4: Wind Pressure Masturbation Reversal

...Huh?! Even though the status window only has four skill slots, the same skill is now taking up two slots?!

GOOOOOOOOOOH!

"I did it! Something weird happened, but I did it!"

"Repeat Wind Pressure Masturbation and Wind Pressure Masturbation Reversal alternately!"

"Right! If I alternate right and left rotation, I can fly straight!"

I lightly jumped and assumed the upside-down gymnastics sitting position.

GOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOH!

Thud!

I floated. Right rotation started.

Activate the opposite Wind Pressure Masturbation!

Good, the right rotation stopped and left rotation slowly began. Repeat this.

Right! Left! Right! Leeeeeft—!

BYUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUR!

My glans couldn’t withstand the alternating left-right rotation, and I ejaculated.

It was completely unexpected!

I was used to up-and-down stroking, but not used to left-right rotational stimulation, so I came after just a few rotations.

While vigorously spraying semen, I spun wildly forward, backward, left, and right at about 5 meters altitude.

Spin spin spin spin!

Thud...

Right as I was falling, Lucia corrected my posture with her hands and let me land on my feet.

"Masaharu, are you okay?"

"Yeah... But this strategy is a failure... The load on my cock is too big, and I keep making small left-right spins..."

"But it felt good, right?"

"Yeah."

It might be useful for masturbation when I don’t have any material someday.

That aside, maybe flying with Wind Pressure Masturbation is actually impossible?

Maybe something simpler, like when I jumped during the day...

"Right. Lucia. Throw me straight up into the sky."

"Huh?"

"If you throw me at an angle I’ll fly off somewhere, so throw me straight up. Then catch me when I fall back down."

"Isn’t that dangerous?"

"Yeah. I’m aware of the risk. If I lose consciousness from fear or piss myself, please save me."

"Understood."

"Give it everything you’ve got."

"Okay."

...At this moment, I had completely forgotten that the person I was talking to was a god.

Thanks to the skill 『Dragon God’s Blessing』, 10% of Lucia’s stats were added to mine.

Conversely, that meant Lucia’s stats were roughly ten times mine.

...I had underestimated the Dragon God’s power because I kept undervaluing myself.

DOGOOOOOON!

The instant the view of Lucia and the city of Monban vanished and I reached the sky, almost unconsciously — probably my survival instinct kicking in — I deployed a barrier around my body.

When I came to my senses, I was in space.

It was already night, so the boundary between the planet and space was unclear.

But far in the distance, I could see a blue glowing arc.

The planet was blue. Well, not Earth, but...

Because it was night, the planet wasn’t a full circle but a crescent shape. However, I didn’t have time to admire the view.

The planet quickly disappeared from sight.

I had been hurled into the depths of space.
